items.title: Ryan Clark net worth and salary: How much did the former ESPN analyst earn before exit?
items.summary: Ryan Clark built his wealth through a 13-year NFL career, lucrative ESPN deals, and the success of his podcast, The Pivot.

items.title: Ex-Villa striker Duran joins seventh club aged 22
